scripts.cleanBuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.cleanBuildProduction: npm run clean && npm run buildProduction
scripts.cleanWatch: npm run clean && npm run watch
scripts.postversion: npm run sync-workspaces && npm run reset
scripts.git:status: git status && git branch -vv && git --no-pager diff dev origin/dev && git stash list && git fsck --full --no-reflogs
scripts.git:remote: git remote -v && git remote show origin
scripts.git:hardreset:main: git fetch origin && git checkout main && git reset --hard origin/main
scripts.git:hardreset:dev: git fetch origin && git checkout dev && git reset --hard origin/dev
scripts.git:hardreset:edge: git fetch origin && git checkout edge && git reset --hard origin/edge
scripts.reset: npm run deepClean && npm run softReset
scripts.softReset: npm install --no-fund --no-audit && npm prune --no-fund --no-audit && npm run build && npm run typecheck && node scripts/npm-link.mjs
scripts.automator: node scripts/run-automator.mjs --monorepo-root && npm --workspaces run automator && npm run reset
scripts.runMeBeforePublish: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run update-htmls && npm run cleanBuild && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run cleanBuildProduction && npm --workspaces pkg delete devDependencies scripts && npm pkg delete devDependencies scripts workspaces && node scripts/prepublish-clean.mjs --workspace && npm install --no-fund --no-audit --omit=dev && npm shrinkwrap --omit=dev
scripts.checkDependencies: npm install --no-fund --no-audit --no-save npm-check-updates && npx --workspaces --include-workspace-root ncu && npm run softReset
scripts.updateDependencies: npm install --no-fund --no-audit --no-save npm-check-updates && npx --workspaces --include-workspace-root ncu -u && npm run softReset
scripts.updateMatter:latest: npm --workspace packages/core uninstall @matter/general @matter/model @matter/node @matter/nodejs @matter/protocol @matter/types && npm --workspace packages/core install  --no-fund --no-audit --save-exact @matter/main@latest && npm run reset
scripts.updateMatter:dev: npm --workspace packages/core uninstall @matter/general @matter/model @matter/node @matter/nodejs @matter/protocol @matter/types && npm --workspace packages/core install --no-fund --no-audit --save-exact @matter/main@dev && npm run reset
scripts.updateMatter:loc: npm --workspace packages/core install ../matter.js/packages/general ../matter.js/packages/main ../matter.js/packages/model ../matter.js/packages/node ../matter.js/packages/nodejs ../matter.js/packages/protocol ../matter.js/packages/types && npm run reset
scripts.docker:run:local: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:local
scripts.docker:run:local:latest: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-latest-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:latest
scripts.docker:run:local:user:latest: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-latest-local --user 1000:1000 -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:latest
scripts.docker:run:hub:latest: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:latest && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-latest-hub -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 luligu/matterbridge:latest
scripts.docker:run:local:dev: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-dev-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:dev
scripts.docker:run:hub:dev: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:dev && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-dev-hub -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 luligu/matterbridge:dev
scripts.docker:run:local:ubuntu: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-ubuntu-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:ubuntu
scripts.docker:run:hub:ubuntu: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:ubuntu && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-ubuntu-hub -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 luligu/matterbridge:ubuntu
scripts.docker:run:local:24-ubuntu-slim: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-24-ubuntu-slim-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge matterbridge:24-ubuntu-slim bash
scripts.docker:run:hub:24-ubuntu-slim: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:24-ubuntu-slim && docker run -it --rm --name matterbridge-24-ubuntu-slim-hub -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge luligu/matterbridge:24-ubuntu-slim bash
scripts.docker:run:local:alpine: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-alpine-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:alpine
scripts.docker:run:hub:alpine: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:alpine && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-alpine-hub -v matterbridge-local-storage:/root/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/root/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 luligu/matterbridge:alpine
scripts.docker:run:local:s6-rc: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-s6-rc-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/addons/matterbridge/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/addons/matterbridge/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:s6-rc
scripts.docker:run:hub:s6-rc: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:s6-rc && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-s6-rc-hub -v matterbridge-local-storage:/addons/matterbridge/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/addons/matterbridge/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 luligu/matterbridge:s6-rc
scripts.docker:run:hub:s6-rc:tag: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:2026.6.3 && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-s6-rc-hub -v matterbridge-local-storage:/addons/matterbridge/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/addons/matterbridge/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 luligu/matterbridge:2026.6.3
scripts.docker:run:local:s6-rc-legacy: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-s6-rc-legacy-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/addons/matterbridge/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/addons/matterbridge/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy
scripts.docker:run:hub:s6-rc-legacy: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-s6-rc-legacy-hub -v matterbridge-local-storage:/addons/matterbridge/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/addons/matterbridge/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 luligu/matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy
scripts.docker:run:hub:s6-rc-legacy:tag: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:2026.6.3-legacy && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-s6-rc-legacy-hub -v matterbridge-local-storage:/addons/matterbridge/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/addons/matterbridge/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 luligu/matterbridge:2026.6.3-legacy
scripts.docker:buildx:local:s6-rc-legacy:amd64: docker buildx build --builder matterbridge --platform linux/amd64 --no-cache --pull -f docker/Dockerfile.s6-rc-legacy -t matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy-amd64 --load .
scripts.docker:buildx:local:s6-rc-legacy:arm64: docker buildx build --builder matterbridge --platform linux/arm64 --no-cache --pull -f docker/Dockerfile.s6-rc-legacy -t matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy-arm64 --load .
scripts.docker:buildx:local:s6-rc-legacy:armv7: docker buildx build --builder matterbridge --platform linux/arm/v7 --no-cache --pull -f docker/Dockerfile.s6-rc-legacy -t matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy-armv7 --load .
scripts.docker:run:local:s6-rc-legacy:amd64: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --platform linux/amd64 --name matterbridge-s6-rc-legacy-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/addons/matterbridge/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/addons/matterbridge/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy-amd64
scripts.docker:run:local:s6-rc-legacy:arm64: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --platform linux/arm64 --name matterbridge-s6-rc-legacy-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/addons/matterbridge/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/addons/matterbridge/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy-arm64
scripts.docker:run:local:s6-rc-legacy:armv7: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --platform linux/arm/v7 --name matterbridge-s6-rc-legacy-local -v matterbridge-local-storage:/addons/matterbridge/.matterbridge -v matterbridge-local-plugins:/addons/matterbridge/Matterbridge -p 8283:8283 matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy-armv7
scripts.docker:run:local:chip-test: npm run docker:rm:all && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-chip-test-local -p 8283:8283 -v "%USERPROFILE%/GitHub/matterbridge/temp:/tmp/matter_testing/logs" matterbridge:chip-test
scripts.docker:buildx:cloud:cache:remove: docker buildx imagetools inspect luligu/matterbridge:buildcache && docker rmi luligu/matterbridge:buildcache
scripts.docker:buildx:cloud:cache:prune: docker buildx du --builder cloud-luligu-matterbridge-builder && docker buildx prune --builder cloud-luligu-matterbridge-builder -a -f
scripts.docker:buildx:cloud:cache:chip-test: docker buildx build --builder cloud-luligu-matterbridge-builder --build-arg CACHE_VERSION=3.9.1 --cache-to type=registry,mode=max,ref=luligu/matterbridge:buildcache --cache-from type=registry,ref=luligu/matterbridge:buildcache --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 --pull -f docker/Dockerfile.chip-test -t luligu/matterbridge:chip-test --push .
scripts.docker:buildx:cloud:chip-test: docker buildx build --builder cloud-luligu-matterbridge-builder --build-arg CACHE_VERSION=3.9.1 --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 --pull -f docker/Dockerfile.chip-test -t luligu/matterbridge:chip-test --push .
scripts.docker:run:hub:chip-test: npm run docker:rm:all && docker pull luligu/matterbridge:chip-test && docker run -dit --network matterbridge --restart always --name matterbridge-chip-test-hub -p 8283:8283 luligu/matterbridge:chip-test
scripts.docker:buildx:create: docker buildx create --name matterbridge --driver docker-container --use && docker run --privileged --rm tonistiigi/binfmt --install all && docker buildx inspect --bootstrap && docker buildx ls
scripts.docker:buildx:hub:s6-rc: docker buildx build --builder matterbridge --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 --no-cache --pull -f docker/Dockerfile.s6-rc -t luligu/matterbridge:s6-rc -t luligu/matterbridge:2026.6.3 --push .
scripts.docker:buildx:hub:s6-rc-legacy: docker buildx build --builder matterbridge --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64,linux/arm/v7 --no-cache --pull -f docker/Dockerfile.s6-rc-legacy -t luligu/matterbridge:s6-rc-legacy -t luligu/matterbridge:2026.6.3-legacy --push .
scripts.docker:buildx:remove: docker rm -f buildx_buildkit_matterbridge0 && docker buildx use desktop-linux && docker buildx rm matterbridge && docker buildx ls
scripts.docker:rm:all: docker rm -f matterbridge-local matterbridge-latest-local matterbridge-dev-local matterbridge-ubuntu-local matterbridge-24-ubuntu-slim-local matterbridge-alpine-local matterbridge-s6-rc-local matterbridge-s6-rc-hub matterbridge-s6-rc-legacy-local matterbridge-s6-rc-legacy-hub matterbridge-latest-hub matterbridge-dev-hub matterbridge-ubuntu-hub matterbridge-24-ubuntu-slim-hub matterbridge-alpine-hub matterbridge-chip-test-local matterbridge-chip-test-hub || node -e "process.exit(0)"
scripts.publish:dev: node scripts/publish-workspaces.mjs --scope @matterbridge --tag dev && npm run reset
scripts.publish:edge: node scripts/publish-workspaces.mjs --scope @matterbridge --tag edge && npm run reset
scripts.publish:latest: node scripts/publish-workspaces.mjs --scope @matterbridge --tag latest && npm run reset
scripts.pack:local: node scripts/pack-workspaces.mjs --scope @matterbridge --tag local && npm run reset
scripts.pack:latest: node scripts/pack-workspaces.mjs --scope @matterbridge --tag latest && npm run reset
